Stories Tagged "Unmapped Place"

A focused archive path for Unmapped Place, collecting 3 related Kyunolab records across 1 shelf.

Lost Worlds

The Village Named on a Ticket Stub: A Lost World Story About Proof That Points Nowhere

A traveler keeps a paper ticket from a village no timetable lists, and the object becomes more troubling than memory alone.

Lost Worlds - 9 min read
Lost Worlds

Hy-Brasil: The Island That Stayed on the Map After It Vanished

A legendary island west of Ireland appearing on maps, then slipping back into fog.

Lost Worlds - 8 min read
Lost Worlds

The Town Printed on One Map and Nowhere Else: A Lost World Built From Cartographic Doubt

One old map names a town that later maps forget, leaving readers to ask whether the place vanished or was never there.

Lost Worlds - 9 min read
